strategy: She hits the whole team hard with Chain Lightning and a Storm Owl variant that deals about 1,400 to all enemies, so keep a healer up and shields ready.
She resists Storm and takes bonus Myth, so hit her with Myth.
Blade through or clear the Scholomari Student (Death) minion and funnel blades to one hitter.
Set up fast and AoE both down before repeated Owl hits wear the team out.
cheatNotes: She announces and casts Chain Lightning, chaining Storm damage across the team.
